title: Honda Smart Key Battery Removal and Installation

blocks.text: Honda Smart Key Battery Removal and Installation

Insert a coin or other object and twist to remove the case, then remove the battery (CR1632) (A). (B) Removing the stamp (C) of the Radio Law certification affixed to the part (B) is a violation of the Radio Law.
Install the battery (CR1632) (A) and close the case. (B) Removing the stamp (C) of the Radio Law certification affixed to the part (B) is a violation of the Radio Law.

items: The buttons must be set correctly and the case closed.
Batteries should be set in the correct position and inserted securely.
